changes.loggedOutCheckout: Pay with Card now opens a friendly login/register modal instead of redirecting or opening Stripe.

modalCopy.title: Log in first
modalCopy.body: Your license needs an account, so log in or register before buying.

changes.checkout401Handling: Account-required responses reopen the login/register modal.
changes.downloadFallback: Public setup URL updated to v1.0.129.

notes: No Stripe checkout is started until an account session exists.
